_comment: Seed passive rules (reflexes). Ported from fs-cortex (MIT © Fernando Montero). Merged into ~/.claude/skills/_passive-rules.json by install.sh Step 5d. Idempotent — existing rules preserved.

rules.inject: Before editing: verify the file was Read recently. If not, Read it first to avoid blind edits.
Code modified. Consider running tests (unit + e2e) to catch regressions.
Before pushing: fetch + rebase first. For force pushes use --force-with-lease (never --force).
Before merging: verify all CI checks pass. Clean up local branch after merge.
Negative instinct feedback detected. Use /downvote <id> to reduce confidence or archive.
